description: Create and activate a 'Smartphone Brand Funnel 2026' survey in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!) featuring a 'Brand Dynamics' question group with cascading exclusion logic. The survey must include: Q1_USE, a Multiple Choice question ('Which of the following smartphone brands do you currently use?') with brands Apple, Samsung, Google, Motorola, and Sony using codes SQ001-SQ005; Q2_REJECT, a Multiple Choice question ('Which of the brands you do NOT use would you never consider buying?') using the same brands and codes but excluding selections from Q1_USE; and Q3_WHY, an Array question ('Why would you never consider these brands?') using the same brands and codes for the Y-axis and 'Too Expensive', 'Poor Quality', 'Bad Design', and 'Privacy Concerns' for the X-axis, filtered to show only selections from Q2_REJECT.
